title: lophocereus schottii var. australis
intro: Lophocereus schottii var. australis, also known as the southern cardón, is a cactus species native to the Baja California Peninsula in Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lophocereus schottii var. australis include soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and reducing fever. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
